description_long: This kiosk features a robust, rectangular structure with thick, solid side panels and a recessed central area. The top surface is dark with a slightly mottled, stone-like texture, while the main body is a deep, matte black or dark gray. At the center of the kiosk, a digital display screen is mounted, framed in red, and angled for easy viewing by users standing in front. The front panel includes illuminated signage and touch-sensitive icons, suggesting interactive functionality. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with no visible windows or doors, and the kiosk appears to be intended for public information or transaction use.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a digital display and illuminated touch interface, finished in dark stone and matte black.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display, illuminated signage, and touch interface clearly, with the recessed central area and thick side panels.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the kiosk, the angled display, and the solid, blocky construction with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, solid back panel with no features, openings, or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angled display and the kiosk's solid, monolithic form.
attribute_signage_type: digital display and illuminated touch icons on the front panel; red frame and white text visible on the screen
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with a stone-like texture, no overhangs or decorative elements
